# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest release of `gitignore` is supported with security updates.
Older releases should be upgraded to the latest version before reporting
an issue.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------- |
| latest  | :white_check_mark:  |
| < latest| :x:                  |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

The preferred way to report a vulnerability is through GitHub's private
vulnerability reporting:

https://github.com/apimgr/gitignore/security/advisories/new

If you are unable to use GitHub's private reporting, you may email:

security@apimgr.us

Please include:

- A description of the vulnerability and its potential impact
- Steps to reproduce, or a proof of concept
- The affected version or commit

## Response Process

- We will acknowledge receipt of your report within 5 business days.
- We will investigate and provide an initial assessment within 10
  business days.
- We will coordinate a disclosure timeline with you once a fix is
  available.
- Credit will be given in the release notes unless you request otherwise.

## Additional Information

This project publishes a machine-readable security contact at:

- `/.well-known/security.txt`
- `/security.txt`
